text_original: it's fun you get to write your own story line
text_zh: 这很有趣，你可以编写属于你自己的故事线。
reply_original: I'm so glad you're enjoying the freedom to craft your own unique storylines! It’s amazing to see the creative worlds our users build. If you ever have ideas to make your storytelling even better or run into any issues, please reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. Keep creating those magical memories!
reply_zh: 我很高兴你能享受自由创作独特故事情节的乐趣！看到用户们构建出如此富有创意的世界，真是太棒了。如果你有任何能让故事创作变得更好的想法，或者遇到任何问题，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。继续创造那些充满魔力的回忆吧！
